name: classification_failed_escalate
description: The classifier never produces a usable label (garbage on every attempt). CLASSIFICATION_FAILED counts as a real finding — it escalates, never polish-only. The ask goes unanswered, so the loop hands the PR back.

rounds.body: the batching here interacts with the new backpressure path in a way worth a closer look
rounds.classifier_response: I looked at the comment against the file but could only return prose; there is no usable triage decision here.
